mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, u.username, r.song_name AS songName, r.artist_name AS artistName, r.album, r.style, r.release_time AS releaseTime, r.cover_url AS coverUrl, r.audio_url AS audioUrl, r.license_desc AS licenseDesc, r.remark, r.status, r.reject_reason AS rejectReason, r.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_song_request r LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON r.user_id = u.id
AND r.status = #{status}
AND (r.song_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.artist_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, u.username, r.song_name AS songName, r.artist_name AS artistName, r.album, r.style, r.release_time AS releaseTime, r.cover_url AS coverUrl, r.audio_url AS audioUrl, r.license_desc AS licenseDesc, r.remark, r.status, r.reject_reason AS rejectReason, r.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_song_request r LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
